name: fb-activity-log-extension-tests
description: Node-side tests for the Chrome extension's media extractor (lib/extract_media.js).

scripts.test: node --test test/extract_media_test.js test/extract_timestamp_test.js test/page_hook_test.js test/date_filter_test.js test/month_range_test.js test/iteration_units_test.js test/merge_harvest_test.js test/activity_log_urls_test.js test/broken_comments_url_test.js
